title: Exploring a European Civic Tech Hub to tackle barriers to civic tech impact
content:
Our latest TICTeC work to help improve the impacts of civic technology takes its form in a collaboration with Sitra (the Finnish Innovation Fund). Together, we are exploring the development of a proposed European Civic Tech Hub.

As part of the Democracy Shield, the European Commission has committed to creating a European Civic
creator: Gemma
sourceDescription: mySociety provides technology, research and data to help people be active citizens, in more than 40 countries around the world.
